features.name: implicit_width_propagation_in_binary_arithmetic
features.description: Code should include binary arithmetic expression combining differently-sized parameters where result width is determined by max(LHS_width, RHS_width) and context-determined width propagation applies
features.snippet:
localparam logic[3:0] A = 4'h0;
localparam B = 46 + A;

features.name: binary_literal_with_context_width_propagation
features.description: Code should include binary literal added to narrower parameter where context (assignment LHS) determines result width expansion
features.snippet: localparam logic[12:0] C = 46 + A;  // A is 4-bit, 46 is 6-bit, context=13

features.name: parameter_arithmetic_without_explicit_casting
features.description: Code should include parameter arithmetic using max-width rule without explicit width casts, relying on context-determined width propagation from assignment
features.snippet:
localparam logic[3:0] A = 4'h0;
localparam B = 46 + A;  // max(6,4)=6, then context=32 propagates back
